test-case.name: Awake_DoesNotThrow_WhenReferencesNull
test-case.output: [SceneBootstrapper] gameplayController is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] startScreen is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] gameScreen is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] gameOverScreen is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] initialsEntryOverlay is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] scoreWidget is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] levelWidget is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] linesWidget is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] nextWidget is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] leaderboardWidget is not assigned!

test-case.name: Awake_OnlyHidesNonNullScreens
test-case.output: [SceneBootstrapper] gameplayController is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] gameScreen is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] gameOverScreen is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] initialsEntryOverlay is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] scoreWidget is not assigned! [SceneBootstrapper] levelWidget is not assigned!
